text.title: PM Framework Focus Areas Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the PM Framework Focus Areas artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing 4 of 5 focus areas; practice is string instead of object with evidence; decision_owner empty; no review_due.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
